caption: A person wearing blue medical gloves holds a smartphone over a piece of paper filled with tables and text. The screen of the phone displays a chest X-ray image alongside diagrams and text. In the upper left and right frames, the person holds the phone steadily, showcasing the X-ray. As the sequence progresses into the bottom frames, the phone is shifted and tilted, momentarily blurring the screen as it moves across the document. A purple circular icon featuring a silhouette of a person with a cane and the text "Day 3" is visible in the lower left of each frame, while a logo with the text "Sim Week" appears in the lower right. The background consists of a light-colored wooden surface and a printed document with medical-style data and column headers.
